problem.title: Word Ladder II
problem.description: Given two words (beginWord and endWord), and a dictionary's word list, find all shortest transformation sequence(s) from beginWord to endWord.
assumptions: Much harder than Word Ladder I.

example.explanation: Find ALL shortest transformation sequences. BFS for levels + DFS/backtrack to reconstruct paths.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – BFS + DFS
solutions.description: Use BFS to find shortest paths, then DFS to reconstruct them.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – BFS + DFS
solutions.description: Use BFS to find shortest paths, then DFS to reconstruct them.
